description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted with a slender build and standing posture. The figure is dressed in a sleeveless top with a fitted cut, paired with straight-leg pants and simple shoes. The arms are unusually elongated and raised upward, forming a wide V-shape above the head, which is a notable stylized feature. The head is oval-shaped with defined facial features, and the hair is styled in a medium-length, straight manner, parted at the center. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the shoes are low-profile, suitable for walking. The overall appearance is casual and modern, with no visible accessories or carried objects.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian with elongated, raised arms, standing upright in fitted clothing and simple shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sleeveless top, straight pants, and both arms raised in a wide V above the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's upward extension, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the back of the top and pants, and the arms crossing above the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, the arm's upward extension, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and straight-leg pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with both arms raised in a wide V-shape
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair parted at the center
